groups.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health
groups.description: SOFABoot actuator health configuration properties for readiness checks, health checker timeouts, and status mapping.

groups.name: sofa.boot.startup.threads.virtual
groups.description: SOFABoot virtual thread startup configuration properties.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.excluded-indicators
properties.description: HealthIndicator bean names excluded from readiness health checks.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.health-checker-config
properties.description: Per HealthChecker configuration keyed by component name.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.health-indicator-config
properties.description: Per HealthIndicator configuration keyed by bean name.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.parallel-check-timeout
properties.description: Timeout for parallel health checks in milliseconds.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.status.http-mapping
properties.description: HTTP status code mapping keyed by health status.

properties.name: sofa.boot.actuator.health.status.order
properties.description: Ordered health statuses from most severe to least severe.

properties.name: sofa.boot.startup.threads.virtual.enabled
properties.description: Whether SOFABoot startup tasks use virtual threads when running on Java 21 or later.

values.description: Default severity order used by Spring Boot health status aggregation.
